enriched_metadata.objective: Provide a small, clean collection of 200 fictional students with basic attributes for learning, practice, and SQL training purposes
enriched_metadata.sources: Fictional dataset created by Zeeshan Ahmad for educational purposes and data science practice
enriched_metadata.features_description: Basic student information including demographics, academic department, performance metrics, and expected graduation timeline - ideal for beginners in data analysis
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: Fictional sample of 200 students aged 18-25 across 5 academic departments with realistic GPA distributions and graduation timelines
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Well-distributed across departments with balanced age groups and realistic GPA ranges
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: Complete fictional dataset with no missing values - designed for educational purposes
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: High-quality fictional dataset designed for educational purposes. Full consent obtained for educational use with transparent data generation process.
